creator: ohartmann@walstatt.org
text:
The port astro/google-earth crashes on FreeBSD 9.0-BETA2/amd64 as well as on FreeBSD 8.2-STABLE/amd64 with SIGNAL 11. 

The content of the error log file located in folder /home/ohartmann/.googleearth/crashlogs for the FreeBSD 9.0 box is as followed.

Google Earth has caught signal 11.



We apologize for the inconvenience, but Google Earth has crashed.
 This is a bug in the program, and should never happen under normal
 circumstances. A bug report and debugging data have been written
 to this text file:

    /home/ohartmann/.googleearth/crashlogs/crashlog-4e621c52.txt

Please include this file if you submit a bug report to Google.


==>>

Minor Version 0

Build Time 00:40:40
OS Type 3
